name: tga-webdriverio-appium
author: Marlon
description: WebdriverIO + Appium test suite for The Grief App

scripts.test.memory-book: wdio run config/wdio.android.app.cucumber.conf.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression='@memory-book' && npm run allure:report
scripts.test.good-memory: wdio run config/wdio.android.app.cucumber.conf.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression='@good-memory' && npm run allure:report
scripts.test.journal: wdio run config/wdio.android.app.cucumber.conf.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression='@journal' && npm run allure:report
scripts.test.resources: wdio run config/wdio.android.app.cucumber.conf.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression='@resources' && npm run allure:report
scripts.test.home: wdio run config/wdio.android.app.cucumber.conf.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression='@home' && npm run allure:report
scripts.test.workbooks: wdio run config/wdio.android.app.cucumber.conf.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression='@workbooks' && npm run allure:report
scripts.test.give-me-a-break: wdio run config/wdio.android.app.cucumber.conf.ts --cucumberOpts.tagExpression='@give-me-a-break' && npm run allure:report
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
